features: INNOVATIVE Apple FLAVOUR: Apple flavored glide floss picks make daily oral care fun and refreshing, offering a fruity alternative to traditional flavors. Enjoy flossing as a tasty, pleasant part of your routine while keeping your mouth clean and healthy.

NANO-HYDROXYAPATITE SUPPORT: These dental floss picks are specially infused with nano-hydroxyapatite, which helps strengthen teeth, reduce plaque buildup, and support overall dental health during regular use.

COLOURFUL & ENGAGING DESIGN: Each pack features four distinct colors, making flossing more engaging, personalized, and easy to track daily use. These tooth picks floss sticks are perfect for adults who want a more enjoyable oral hygiene routine.

GENTLE GLIDE FOR TIGHT TEETH: Ultra-thin floss thread slides effortlessly between tight teeth without shredding. Each glide floss pick reaches areas brushing alone can’t, effectively removing plaque and debris along the gum line for a complete clean.

CONVENIENT & LONG-LASTING SUPPLY: Each pack contains 80 flossing sticks in a handy canister, designed with comfortable handles and a pick end to remove larger food particles. Perfect for home, office, or travel, ensuring consistent and effective daily oral care.
